# Channel Design Overview

This folder now keeps implementation details and future ideas separate:

- [`CHANNEL_DESIGN_VERIFIED.md`](./CHANNEL_DESIGN_VERIFIED.md) — reflects current behaviour in `kc_chan.c`.
- [`CHANNEL_DESIGN_FUTURE.md`](./CHANNEL_DESIGN_FUTURE.md) — holds experiments and wishlist items.

Start with the verified doc when you are tracing code. Switch to the future doc when you are brainstorming changes.
